title: Semantic Deduplication for Scientific Papers
abstract: Abstract: We address the challenge of scientific paper recommendation. We propose a relation separated framework for duplicate detection. Experiments on a benchmark dataset show improved ranking quality.

title: Semantic Deduplication for Scientific Papers
abstract: We address the challenge of scientific paper recommendation. We propose a relation separated framework for duplicate detection. Experiments on a benchmark dataset show improved ranking quality.

title: A Survey of Literature Recommendation Methods
abstract: This survey presents an overview of scientific literature recommendation. It reviews graph models, neural retrieval, benchmark datasets and evaluation tasks for document ranking.

title: Benchmark Dataset for Paper Retrieval
abstract: We introduce a benchmark dataset for scientific paper retrieval. Results show that relation aware ranking improves retrieval quality for document recommendation.

title: Image Segmentation with Diffusion Models
abstract: We study image segmentation and propose a diffusion model for visual recognition. Experiments demonstrate improved accuracy on image benchmarks.
